note: Feed a single item to a task/swarm, not this whole file. implementation_pattern tells you whether this is a new native CPT (mirrors useDoctors()), an ACF-only extension of an existing CPT (no new hook shape, just extend the return + a mapper), or a custom endpoint (rare — reserved for aggregation like clinic-info). Merge completed items into progress.json's task ledger via progress-tracker.js rather than tracking status here.

prerequisites_block_everything_below.title: Resolve feature-flag default direction (R3)
prerequisites_block_everything_below.why: useFeatureFlag/useSectionVisible are documented as hard opt-out (?? true). Every Phase-4 flag added before this is resolved will silently default to true for existing tenants.
resolution_options: Extend hooks to accept an explicit per-call default (useFeatureFlag(name, { defaultValue: false }))
Tenant-config backend always returns explicit false for new flag keys
acceptance_criteria: Decision recorded in shared memory as decision:flag-default
At least one new Phase-4 flag proven to default off for a tenant-config row missing that key

prerequisites_block_everything_below.title: T_302 — tenant-config endpoint returns sections/navigation/features
prerequisites_block_everything_below.why: Already an open blocker in progress.json. Without it, no Phase-4 flag can be validated against a real tenant — only against VITE_USE_MOCKS=true.
prerequisites_block_everything_below.note: Not duplicating T_302 here — just making the Phase-4 dependency explicit. Track status in progress.json, not this file.
